advancements.the_pigmy_god_slayer.title: This one looks angrier
dialogue.him.cutted: Seems that communication wascutted on your side, let me-explain myself in short, I--need your help, for that youmust grow stronger, and for-that once you are capable oftaking all champions.-------Do you accept?
dialogue.him.cutted.question: Yes-------------------------No
dialogue.him.dimensions: About the dimensions? You---must know i only have seen--the "surface" of those------dimensions and barely have--any internal knowledge
dialogue.him.dimensions.question: §bPermafrost Dimension------§6Ryumsky Dimension
dialogue.him.greetings: Ill be direct, i need you togrow strong enough to help--me defeat a creature that isgoing to be a menace for----everything in the future.---And for so i need you to be-strong enough, hear me and--soon enough we will met.
dialogue.him.introduction.question: Who are you?----------------What are you?---------------Greetings.
dialogue.him.main.question: Report progress-------------Ask about the dimensions-------Ask about the Objective
dialogue.him.negated: Well. Have you reconsidered-about helping me out?
dialogue.him.negated.question: Yes-------------------------No
dialogue.him.no: Then, i will be waitingtillyou change your mindset
dialogue.him.no.question: Back to Main
dialogue.him.objective: To make you stronger so you-can help me, this by taking-down the champions in fights
dialogue.him.objective.question: Back
dialogue.him.onwhat: I need your help to kill----something that is menacing--everything, right now you---are unable to help at all,--so i task you to become-----stronger than your current--self.-----------------------Do you accept this task?-
dialogue.him.onwhat.question: Yes.------------------------No.
dialogue.him.permafrost0: Permafrost, of course an icerock, sun barely enters to--heat its scape, his championattempted the ultimate------sacrifice, meaning he is----incredibly strong compared--to everyone else, not only--that. But the ambient itself
dialogue.him.permafrost1: It's cold enough for even---someone like you who can----live in asteroids ring.-----No sun or atmosphere there,--or the core of your planet,-while the inhabitants are---not as dangeours as those---spaces within the Overworld
dialogue.him.permafrost2: Just the ambient will be----enough to kill anyone exceptsome creatures that have----evolved there, you are no---exception, i would even burnme alive just to not be coldon that dimension, speciallyfor that annoying ice wolf
dialogue.him.progress0: Doesn't matter how much you-have done individually, if--you dont defeat any championis going to be of no use.
dialogue.him.progress0.question: Back------------------------Tips
dialogue.him.progress1: Very well done, since all---champions have a similar----level of power, taking any--else shouldn't be a problem-but you still need to be----ready for what is to appear
dialogue.him.progress1.question: Back------------------------Tips
dialogue.him.ryumsky0: Ryumsky, contains a massive-electro magnetic field that-is compressed on its center.This field exerts a gravity-so strong that stops its----own energy to separate due--to the magnetism force of---itself
dialogue.him.ryumsky1: Although not strong enough--to exort it into the outer--external debris, causing theearth on top of it to crack-into three layers.----------The upper one being positiveThe middle one being neutralThe lower one being negative
dialogue.him.ryumsky2: This is something unique.---Even for me, this happened--during the event that forcedthe dimensions to connect,--but also mutated the living-beings there into the-------respective energy, others---gaining divinity even.
dialogue.him.ryumsky3: But you must listen, i can--feel an horrid presence on--that dimension, whatever youdo, be extremely careful----on the lower layer.---------Unless you are not alone youwont defeat what lies there
dialogue.him.tips0: If you want one to take downfocus on the Earth one, he--should be the easiest but toreally grow strong, go for--the Fire or Ice champion as-they are the strongest
dialogue.him.tips0.question: Back to main
dialogue.him.tips1: Well, your universe works ina really simple way, now----that you have taken down a--champion element, go for theone easier to your current--power, good luck.
dialogue.him.tips1.question: Back to main
dialogue.him.what: What am i doesnt matter-----right now, what matters is--that i need your help, but Ican tell you that you've yetnever seen a being similar--to me.
dialogue.him.what.question: On what---------------------And why would I do so?
dialogue.him.who: Who am i doesnt matter------right now, what matters is--that i need your help
dialogue.him.who.question: On what---------------------And why would I do so?
dialogue.him.why: I know your kind, that you--seek entertainment, player---you wont pass the chance to-entertain yourself, right?
dialogue.him.why.question: Well, what do you need help.No, I decline
dialogue.him.yes: Well done, for you to becomestronger quickly i task you-to challenge all champions--of all other dimensions and-remain as the champion of---your own dimension, contact-me when you've achieved so
dialogue.zacariel.avariel0: Avariel? Well, is a common--known fact that like around-a milenia ago he used to be-a proper champion,but based-on what the phoenix told me-when the connection among---portals appeared and he and-his brothers and sisters----
dialogue.zacariel.avariel1: started being born, he------became frightened of any----menace from other dimensionsand thus started grasping---for power, quickly growing--with new knowledge he becamea full on megalomaniac.---------------------------------
dialogue.zacariel.avariel2: While searching for more----power he found an old spell-called "ultimate sacrifice"-while the phoenix prohibitedme from knowing further moreseems that the spell was to-separate his soul from his--body, at the cost of others.
dialogue.zacariel.avariel3: Thus, to achieve this he----caused the event that the---dimension is called after.--The Permafrost spell.-------Causing millions of spykes--to emerge from the ground---all around the entire planetcausing a massive extinction
dialogue.zacariel.avariel4: Now, as a soul he even couldkill our phoenix even if he-wasnt holding back like withme, but when planning to----attack other dimensions the-same way, a creature in bluerobes appeared and battled--Avariel, winning the match--
dialogue.zacariel.avariel5: But instead of killing him--he just sealed Avariel, the-phoenix doesnt know why he--did this, this included:----Turned his castle into the--labyrinth, builded the golemto guard the seal, and even-used his own armor as a seal
dialogue.zacariel.dimensions: Another dimensions, sorry,--but i barely know about any-other dimensions, but ive---contacted you and who is----Ryumsky's champion, and fromhim i can only say that, he.Is extremely racist.
dialogue.zacariel.main: Oh, Overworld champion!-----What is the reason you've---contacted me?
dialogue.zacariel.main.question: Ask about the pigmies-------Ask about Avariel-----------Ask about other dimensions--
dialogue.zacariel.pigmy0: mmm, you want to know about-my species?-----------------Well, obviusly my species,--called the pigmies are rightnow nomaids, segregated intoseveral clans, this due to--the presence of true ice,---thanks to them regrowing----
dialogue.zacariel.pigmy1: This unless Avariel died,---even if he was sealeed his--power still remained in the-spykes, but now, they will--eventually melt and i now asthe champion, can use my newinfluence to unify my entirerace.
effect.the_forgotten_dimensions.anti_fli: If the target is on air for a short amount of time, will be pulled to the ground
effect.the_forgotten_dimensions.calcinat: Interacts with other §3elements §faccordinly to compatibility, increases §4Fire damage §fthe mob takes, is inflicted when dealing any sort of §4Fire damage, §fand can have infinite duration
effect.the_forgotten_dimensions.frost_bu: Damages the entity with §bIce Damage §feach time more
effect.the_forgotten_dimensions.heal_cut: Decreases §2healing §fan entity takes by 10% per level, displays on the hotbar the amount of health lose to players
effect.the_forgotten_dimensions.ice_curs: Decreases §bIce defence, §fnormal armor, and dissables immunity to §bPermafrost temperature §ffrom §bAvariel's Necklace
effect.the_forgotten_dimensions.snowgrav: Kills the entity when duration finishes
effect.the_forgotten_dimensions.wet.desc: §7Interacts with other §3elements §7accordinly to compatibility. Inflicted when taking any §9Water damage §7or while in the rain/water
